memories.content: We migrated the auth layer from session cookies to JWT with refresh rotation in auth/middleware.ts.
Added rate limiting per user in the API gateway after the auth change.
Observed SQLite WAL growth beyond 200MB on 2026-02-10 during heavy ingest.
Fixed WAL growth by checkpointing every 1000 writes; size stabilized under 50MB on 2026-02-11.

query: When was the WAL growth issue fixed?

memories.content: Replaced eslint with Biome in package.json scripts; lint time dropped 10x.
CI now runs biome check --write=false on pull requests.
Deployed harness-mem daemon v0.25.8 to production with launchd keepalive.
Rolled back v0.25.6 publish gate failure; v0.25.8 passed npm and GitHub release.

query: Which version was deployed to production?

memories.content: Cursor hook ingest advanced offset past failed recordEvent during embedding warmup.
Bounded cursor ingest to 50 events per run; deferred remainder with eventsDeferred.

query: How was cursor hook ingest bounded?
